user.title: MySair
user.description: Sign in with your MySair account credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate MySair
reauth_confirm.description: The session for {email} has expired or is no longer valid. Enter your password again to continue.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to MySair. Please try again later.

stop_installation.name: Stop installation
stop_installation.description: Stops an entire MySair installation (all its zones at once) using the backend's "stop" command. Different from turning off each zone individually with a switch or climate entity.

installation_ref.name: Installation reference
installation_ref.description: Reference (ctl) of the installation to stop, as it appears in parentheses in the device name of its entities (e.g. "MYS94B97E0C9177FB6").
